_comment: Curated repertoire for the Repertoire Trainer (see docs/ai-dlc/specs/repertoire-trainer.md). Each entry is one named line. A line has either a SAN 'line' (replayed from the standard start by app/repertoire.py, which validates legality and derives UCIs) OR a 'trapId' (+ optional 'variation') that reuses a line from data/traps.json. 'yourColor' is the side you play; the loader groups by color -> parentOpening -> line and builds a per-color move tree for practice. Invariant: at a node where it is YOUR turn, exactly one prepared move; opponent-turn nodes may branch (variety). Grow this file by adding entries.

lines.name: Giuoco Pianissimo
lines.note: Quiet build-up: c3/d3, slow maneuvering middlegame.

lines.name: Main Line (3...Qa5)
lines.note: Accept and develop with tempo on the queen.

lines.name: Najdorf Variation
lines.note: Your Sicilian as Black: the Najdorf.

lines.name: King's Indian Defense
lines.note: Your Indian vs 1.d4: the King's Indian.

lines.name: Fried Liver Attack
lines.note: Trap leaf: the Two Knights sac on f7.

lines.name: Legal Trap
lines.note: Trap leaf: the classic queen sac mate.

lines.name: Petrov Queen Trap
lines.note: Trap leaf: Nxc6 forking the queen.

lines.name: Siberian Trap
lines.note: Trap leaf (as Black): ...Qxh2 against the Smith-Morra.
